name: @ythalorossy/thoughtworks-anthology-auditor
description: Claude skill — audits a codebase for code-quality smells (OO discipline, primitive obsession, train wrecks, anaemic domain, framework coupling, god validators, DDD purity) and produces a severity-ranked Markdown report. Based on Object Calisthenics and Domain Annotations from The ThoughtWorks Anthology (2008).
author: Ythalo Saldanha <ysaldanha@checkbook.org>
